annual_cross_border_journeys.rationale: Eurostat cross-border rail passenger statistics indicate roughly 25-50M annual journeys on priority EU corridors; range widened for definitional uncertainty about which journeys count as eligible.

peak_daily_clearing_obligation_eur.rationale: Peak-day cross-border ticket sales times average ticket value; speculative bottom-up estimate with high uncertainty given unknown peak-to-mean ratio and blended average fare across mixed corridors.

clearing_fee_per_ticket_eur.rationale: PSD2 interchange fees sit at 0.10-0.30 EUR while existing rail distribution per-segment fees run 0.50-2.00 EUR; spans both benchmarks given uncertainty over which model the clearing fee adopts.

average_fte_monthly_cost_eur.rationale: EU agency loaded-cost averages for senior technical and policy staff in Brussels typically cluster 10-22k EUR/month including overhead, pension, and employer charges.
